creator: lioux@gns.com.br
text:
This package is not compatible with perl versions 5.004 and later.

Fix: 

Not known. Contact with the author is been tried.
	For now, a broken line should be added to the port makefile.
	I wrote a little patch with a suitable broken message, I left it at
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/p5-B-port-broken.patch.gz
MD5 (p5-B-port-broken.patch.gz) = bf4487c144486198245bef2cb50160d2
How-To-Repeat: 
	Just try to use the port to translate a perl script into a C
source file in any of the affected enviroments.
